configurePresets.name: ninja-release
configurePresets.description: Bounded preset for normal toolchains (aligns with rawrxd::sovereign::TargetManifest — not a syscall lab).

configurePresets.name: linux-ninja-release
configurePresets.description: Use on Linux runners or WSL; select explicitly: cmake --preset linux-ninja-release

configurePresets.name: darwin-ninja-release
configurePresets.description: Host build on Apple Silicon or Intel macOS; see docs/BUILD_HOST_MATRIX.md

configurePresets.name: android-ndk-release
configurePresets.description: Requires ANDROID_NDK env pointing at NDK root. See docs/BUILD_HOST_MATRIX.md

configurePresets.name: ios-xcode-release
configurePresets.displayName: iOS: Xcode + Release (cross, macOS host only)
configurePresets.description: Requires Xcode on macOS; not all repo targets support iOS — subset builds. See docs/BUILD_HOST_MATRIX.md
